markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To reinforce production team quality standards and review new operational processes.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Production owns final quality.** The production team is the final quality gate; EMs are not editors. Substandard work erodes client trust and can damage the company's reputation across its interconnected client network.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [**Use Linear for systemic fixes.** File tickets for recurring issues (e.g., \>30% rewrites) to fix the pipeline, not just the content. Proactive follow-up on tickets is required to prevent blocks.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [**New OOO process is self-serve.** Production teammates now create their own coverage plans in Notion for OOO \>1 week, finding a peer to cover and notifying their EM.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [**SEO MetaTags workflow is improved.** The workflow now accepts custom writing guidelines via an artifact and generates three options, addressing past feedback on quality and lack of choice.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)

## Topics

### Quality & Trust: Production's Responsibility

  - [**The Problem:** Substandard work is eroding client trust.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
      - [**Impact:** One poor deliverable can negate goodwill from ten good ones.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
      - [**Risk:** Poor performance for one client can damage the company's reputation with other clients who share the same stakeholders (e.g., fractional CMOs).](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [**The Solution:** Production owns final quality.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [**EM Role:** Client strategy, expectation management, and high-level feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
      - [**Production Role:** Ensure all deliverables meet the client's "standard of good" before submission.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [**Action:** Proactively work with EMs to define the standard and create a clear editorial checklist.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**Human Judgment is Non-Negotiable:**](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
      - [**Why:** Atlas relies on Claude, a non-deterministic system whose output quality varies daily.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
      - [**Result:** The pipeline can produce "filet one day and dog food the next."](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
      - [**Conclusion:** Human review is essential to maintain a consistent quality baseline and drive continuous improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

### Systemic Fixes: When to Use Linear

  - [**Purpose:** Linear tickets provide data to identify and fix systemic issues in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
    1.  [**File Ticket:** Document any bugs or recurring problems.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
    2.  [**Follow Up:** Check your Linear inbox regularly for questions from the engineering team.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
    3.  [**Prevent Blocks:** Respond promptly to avoid delaying the fix. Tag your EM if client input (e.g., an API key) is required.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [**When to File:**](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [**Recurring Issues:** If you're consistently rewriting \>30% (ideally 40–50%) of an article, the pipeline is inefficient and needs fixing.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [**Strategic One-Offs:** If a one-off issue signals a new content type, ask your EM if it will recur. If yes, file a ticket to build a sustainable pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)

### New Process: Out-of-Office (OOO) Coverage

  - [**Goal:** Shift OOO coverage planning from leadership to the production team.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [**Process for OOO ≥1 Week:**](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
    1.  [**Create Plan:** Use the "Create a Plan" button in Notion (PodHQ or your Pod page).](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
    2.  [**Document Details:** Include dates, EM, pod, and client.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
    3.  [**Add Resources:** Link to the client's Operating Manual, Editorial Checklist, Content OS, and Atlas pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
    4.  [**Add Context:** Include notes on tone, style, and examples of successful content.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)
    5.  **Find Coverage:**
          - [Post the plan in your pod's Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
          - [Use the "Overview of who might have capacity" table to find a peer.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
          - If needed, post a summary in the main `#production-team` channel.
    6.  [**Notify EM:** Inform your EM once coverage is confirmed.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2264.0)
  - **Process for OOO \<1 Week:**
      - [Complete all scheduled work ahead of time.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
      - [Consider creating a plan for complex situations (e.g., a multi-day absence during a critical delivery window).](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)

### System Updates: SEO MetaTags & Time Doctor

  - [**SEO MetaTags Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
      - [**Improvement:** The workflow now accepts custom writing guidelines via a separate artifact (e.g., `meta tag guidelines`).](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2375.0)
      - [**Output:** Generates three options for each meta tag.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2452.0)
  - [**Time Doctor:**](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2510.0)
      - [**Mechanism:** The Atlas pipeline acts as a "writer," pasting task titles into Time Doctor.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2526.0)
      - [**Limitation:** Time Doctor's API prevents renaming individual tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2564.0)
      - [**Workaround for Title Changes:**](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2635.0)
        1.  [Submit a generic list (e.g., "Article 1") to overwrite existing tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2635.0)
        2.  [Submit the final, correct list.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2635.0)
      - [**Required App:** Use the desktop app for tracking. Do not use the Google Docs browser extension, as it creates opaque data buckets.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2898.0)
      - [**Support:** Mariana (Nana) can fix errors, such as a pipeline requiring all slots to be filled.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2788.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**All Production Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
      - [File Linear tickets for systemic issues and follow up on them.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
      - [Use the new OOO Notion process for absences ≥1 week.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
      - [Use the Time Doctor desktop app for tracking; uninstall the browser extension.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2898.0)
  - [**Matthew Panzarino:**](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
      - [Ship the "audit pipeline" tool next week to provide an objective editorial check.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [**Mariana (Nana):**](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2743.0)
      - [Contact Time Doctor to request disabling the automatic browser extension prompt.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=3078.0)
      - [Manually fix Time Doctor pipeline errors as they arise.](https://fathom.video/share/VyNo1GX3zWozzXtsEq9DLwi41sok2yh7?tab=summary&timestamp=2788.0)
